objective: OpenCodex에서 OpenAI와 xAI를 제외한 provider chase 전체를 durable docs-first 로드맵으로 고정한다. Sakana Fugu/Fugu Ultra direct API provider를 첫 구현 단위로 승격하고, Cursor client-version owner, Antigravity replay와 picker/alias 분리, OpenCode Go Kimi effort, Z.AI weekly-limit 분류, Anthropic stream/tool replay, 소비자 기반 metadata, DeepInfra, 선별 long-tail provider, Vertex ADC setup, Amazon Bedrock Mantle와 native Runtime, 최종 통합 검증을 각각 한 PABCD work-phase와 decade 문서로 나눈다. 각 문서는 현재 소스의 정확한 owner와 테스트 경로, NEW/MODIFY/DELETE 범위, 활성화 시나리오, 검증 명령, DONE/NOOP/BLOCKED/UNSAFE/NEEDS_HUMAN 기준을 적는다. OpenAI와 xAI 변경, 구현 코드 변경, 배포와 push는 이 docs-only 사이클의 범위 밖이다. 기존 chase 문서의 낡은 Fugu REJECT 판정과 전역 index를 최신 공식 API 계약에 맞춰 갱신하고, 독립 감사를 통과한 문서 세트와 goalplan 등록을 이번 사이클의 완료 조건으로 삼는다.

tasks.title: Write and independently audit the complete decade roadmap

criteria.scenario: The docs-first roadmap is complete and independently audited
criteria.expectedEvidence: 000-002 and 010-150 documents, chase SoT sync, reviewer PASS, link and goalplan checks
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit a8c80cb1; reviewer final VERDICT PASS; fresh checker: files=18, workPhases=16, criteria=16, missingPrefixes/Links/Modify/Sections/WpDocs/forbidden all zero; git diff --check HEAD^ HEAD exit 0

criteria.scenario: Direct Sakana Fugu works through the keyed Responses lane
criteria.expectedEvidence: registry/payload/stream tests and authenticated Sakana smoke

criteria.scenario: Cursor discovery and Run share one proven version owner
criteria.expectedEvidence: header parity tests plus authenticated discovery and Run probe

criteria.scenario: Antigravity replay is index-safe and picker retirement preserves aliases
criteria.expectedEvidence: interleaved replay tests and authenticated availability evidence

criteria.scenario: Kimi base and highspeed expose only proven effort combinations
criteria.expectedEvidence: separate live matrices and reasoning/tool-choice tests

criteria.scenario: Z.AI weekly exhaustion is terminal without harming transient rate limits
criteria.expectedEvidence: real sanitized fixture and provider-scoped key-failover tests

criteria.scenario: Anthropic interleaved stream blocks and malformed tool arguments cannot cross-contaminate
criteria.expectedEvidence: indexed stream and replay round-trip fixtures

criteria.scenario: Every added metadata field has a consumer and precedence contract
criteria.expectedEvidence: catalog/runtime activation tests and no generic metadata bag

criteria.scenario: DeepInfra is a live-model keyed provider
criteria.expectedEvidence: model discovery, stream/tool/error tests and authenticated smoke

criteria.scenario: Cohere compatibility API supports the advertised Codex surface
criteria.expectedEvidence: current model proof, tool/stream tests and authenticated smoke

criteria.scenario: AI21 Jamba supports the advertised Chat Completions surface
Databricks workspace provider validates host/model and preserves destination security
criteria.expectedEvidence: URL negatives, management/GUI tests and workspace smoke

criteria.scenario: Bedrock Mantle provides the OpenAI-compatible Bedrock lane with explicit storage semantics
Vertex existing ADC/OAuth flow is first-class without duplicating secrets
criteria.expectedEvidence: ADC source/redaction/setup tests and live Vertex smoke

criteria.scenario: Native Bedrock is added only for a named Mantle gap with bounded auth/event handling
criteria.expectedEvidence: need proof, event-stream negatives, local E2E, and bounded live smoke or NOOP evidence

criteria.scenario: All provider surfaces and chase docs close consistently
criteria.expectedEvidence: full tests/typecheck/privacy/gui build, runtime smokes, docs sync, and goalplan validation
